text: Bitcoin and Ethereum are both slightly down on the day in a market gripped by extreme fear, with the Fear & Greed index at 12 and worsening over the past week. Bitcoin's dominance holding steady at 55.6% alongside modest 24-hour volume of $49B suggests traders are cautious rather than panicked into selling, though the broader crypto market is showing weakness across most major assets. The mild outperformance of Solana (+0.9%) against larger declines elsewhere hints at some selective positioning, but overall sentiment remains heavily risk-off.
